lines.speaker: Dale
lines.text: Greetings, traveller. I'd love to stop and talk, but farming is a busy line of work. Perhaps another time?

lines.speaker: Chief Farmer
lines.text: Greetings, traveller. I am the Chief Farmer of Hosidius. My wife and I manage the efforts of all of our farmers.

lines.speaker: Chief Farmer
lines.text: Quite well but we can always be doing more. Perhaps you could help?

lines.speaker: Chief Farmer
lines.text: We need to till the soil to prepare it for crops. Head outside and operate the ploughs along the fields.

lines.speaker: Chief Farmer
lines.text: The ploughs are old and may become damaged after too much use, but I'm sure that won't be a problem for such a well trained adventurer like yourself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds like hard work, what's in it for me?

lines.speaker: Chief Farmer
lines.text: Well, by helping us you'll become more recognized and as that happens we can offer you many benefits.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for the information, I'll see what I can do.

lines.speaker: Chief Farmer
lines.text: Thank you, [player name]! Just find a plough to get started.

lines.speaker: Chief Farmer
lines.text: If you change your mind just find a plough and use it.
